name: BFRemindersPermissionManager
summary: Reminders permission request + guide alert helper (Swift, ObjC-callable).
description:
BFRemindersPermissionManager provides a simple API to request Apple Reminders permission and show a "Go to Settings" guide alert.

- Swift implementation; Objective-C callable
- Built-in English and Simplified Chinese (zh-Hans) localization for guide alert
- Host app must provide NSRemindersUsageDescription in Info.plist
